info.title: YFinance Stock Price Data for Numerai Signals
info.subtitle: Daily Updates of Stock OHLCV (Close, High, Low, Open, Volume)
info.description: This Stock price OHLCV data is updated daily to be used for the weekly submission to the Numerai Signals. Note that there are some very strange values especially for (adjusted) close and volume data, which are known to be an issue with the Yahoo! Finance API. When you use this data, make sure that you deal with these unrealisitc values.
